Cambodian unions vs. Nike

Filed16 May 2019
CompanyNike Inc.
Country of operationCambodia
ComplainantCoalition of Cambodian Apparel Workers Democratic Union (CCAWDU)
National Contact PointUS NCP
OutcomeMediation accepted — partial agreement reached 2021

Issues alleged

  • Freedom of association / union-busting
  • Severance pay withheld after factory closure
  • Labor rights
